adding info on how to use the template
revision.text:
== Usage == Use this template to create a reference list in an article. For Example: 
== Content ==

Lorem ipsum.

== References ==

{{reflist}}
== See also == * [[Wikipedia:Citing sources]] * [[Wikipedia:Footnotes]]

revision.comment: more details of example
revision.text:
== Usage == Use this template to create a reference list in an article. For Example: 
== Content ==

Lorem ipsum.{{cite web|title=site1|url=http://en.wikipedia.org|accessdate=2006-10-19}}

Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet.{{cite web|title=site2|url=http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Wikipedia|accessdate=2006-10-22}}

== References ==

{{reflist}}
== See also == * [[Wikipedia:Citing sources]] * [[Wikipedia:Footnotes]]

== Usage == Use this template to create a reference list in an article (unlike [[Template:Reference]], '''Reflist''' doesn't include the ''References'' heading, thereby making the syntax easier to read). For Example: 
== Content ==

Lorem.{{cite web|title=site1|url=http://en.wikipedia.org|accessdate=2006-10-19}}

Lorem ipsum.{{cite web|title=site2|url=http://de.wikipedia.org|accessdate=2006-10-22}}

== References ==

{{reflist}}
== See also == * [[Wikipedia:Citing sources]] * [[Wikipedia:Footnotes]] [[Category:Citation templates| ]]

revision.text:
== Usage == Use this template to create a reference list in an article (unlike [[Template:Reference]], '''Reflist''' doesn't include the ''References'' heading, thereby making the syntax easier to read). For Example: 
== Content ==

Lorem.Source name, access date, etc.

Lorem ipsum.Source name, access date, etc.

== References ==

{{reflist}}
== Parameters == Using {{reflist|2}} will create a two-column reference list, and {{reflist|3}} will create a three-column list. == See also == * [[Wikipedia:Citing sources]] * [[Wikipedia:Footnotes]] [[Category:Citation templates| ]]

revision.comment: /* Parameters */ mention "only in mozilla"
revision.text:
== Usage == Use this template to create a reference list in an article (unlike [[Template:Reference]], '''Reflist''' doesn't include the ''References'' heading, thereby making the syntax easier to read). For Example: 
== Content ==

Lorem.Source name, access date, etc.

Lorem ipsum.Source name, access date, etc.

== References ==

{{reflist}}
== Parameters == Using {{reflist|2}} will create a two-column reference list, and {{reflist|3}} will create a three-column list. Currently, multiple columns only render properly in Mozilla/Firefox. [http://www.stuffandnonsense.co.uk/archives/css3_multi-column_thriller.html] == See also == * [[Wikipedia:Citing sources]] * [[Wikipedia:Footnotes]] [[Category:Citation templates| ]]

revision.comment: changes to documentation of parameters
revision.text:
== Usage == Use this template to create a reference list in an article (unlike [[Template:Reference]], '''Reflist''' doesn't include the ''References'' heading, thereby making the syntax easier to read). For Example: 
== Content ==

Lorem ipsum.Source name, access date, etc.

Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet.Source name, access date, etc.

== References ==

{{reflist}}
== Parameters == Using {{reflist|2}} will create a two-column reference list, and {{reflist|3}} will create a three-column list. Using simply {{reflist|2}} will create a reference list which uses CSS3 to automatically choose the number of columns based on the width of the web browser and the size of the text. Currently, multiple columns only render properly in Mozilla/Firefox. [http://www.stuffandnonsense.co.uk/archives/css3_multi-column_thriller.html] == See also == * [[Wikipedia:Citing sources]] * [[Wikipedia:Footnotes]] [[Category:Citation templates| ]]

revision.comment: /* Parameters */ minor
revision.text:
== Usage == Use this template to create a reference list in an article (unlike [[Template:Reference]], '''Reflist''' doesn't include the ''References'' heading, thereby making the syntax easier to read). For Example: 
== Content ==

Lorem ipsum.Source name, access date, etc.

Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet.Source name, access date, etc.

== References ==

{{reflist}}
== Parameters == Using {{reflist|2}} will create a two-column reference list, and {{reflist|3}} will create a three-column list. Using simply {{reflist}} will create a reference list which incorporates CSS3 to automatically choose the number of columns based on the width of the web browser and the size of the text. Currently, multiple columns only render properly in Mozilla/Firefox. [http://www.stuffandnonsense.co.uk/archives/css3_multi-column_thriller.html] == See also == * [[Wikipedia:Citing sources]] * [[Wikipedia:Footnotes]] [[Category:Citation templates| ]]

revision.comment: change the default back to only a single column, see talk
revision.text:
== Usage == Use this template to create a reference list in an article (unlike [[Template:Reference]], '''Reflist''' doesn't include the ''References'' heading, thereby making the syntax easier to read). For Example: 
== Content ==

Lorem ipsum.Source name, access date, etc.

Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet.Source name, access date, etc.

== References ==

{{reflist}}
== Multiple columns == Using {{reflist|2}} will create a two-column reference list, and {{reflist|3}} will create a three-column list. Using {{reflist|colwidth=30em}} will allow the browser to automatically choose the number of columns based on the width of the web browser. Choose a column width that's appropriate for the average width of the references on the page. (note: multiple columns currently render properly only in Mozilla/Firefox. [http://www.stuffandnonsense.co.uk/archives/css3_multi-column_thriller.html]) == See also == * [[Wikipedia:Citing sources]] * [[Wikipedia:Footnotes]] [[Category:Citation templates| ]]

revision.comment: /* Multiple columns */ note that CSS3 means multiple columns will be more widely available
revision.text:
== Usage == Use this template to create a reference list in an article (unlike [[Template:Reference]], '''Reflist''' doesn't include the ''References'' heading, thereby making the syntax easier to read). For Example: 
== Content ==

Lorem ipsum.Source name, access date, etc.

Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet.Source name, access date, etc.

== References ==

{{reflist}}
== Multiple columns == Using {{reflist|2}} will create a two-column reference list, and {{reflist|3}} will create a three-column list. Using {{reflist|colwidth=30em}} will allow the browser to automatically choose the number of columns based on the width of the web browser. Choose a column width that's appropriate for the average width of the references on the page. Note: multiple columns currently render properly only in Mozilla/Firefox. [http://www.stuffandnonsense.co.uk/archives/css3_multi-column_thriller.html], though the feature is included in [[Cascading Style Sheets|CSS3]], so it should work for a larger number of browsers in the future. [http://www.w3.org/TR/css3-multicol/] == See also == * [[Wikipedia:Citing sources]] * [[Wikipedia:Footnotes]] [[Category:Citation templates| ]]

revision.comment: reflist
revision.text:
== Usage == Use this template to create a reference list in an article (unlike [[Template:Reference]], '''Reflist''' doesn't include the ''References'' heading, thereby making the syntax easier to read). For Example: 
== Content ==

Lorem ipsum.Source name, access date, etc.

Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet.Source name, access date, etc.

== References ==

{{reflist}}
== Multiple columns == Using {{reflist|2}} will create a two-column reference list, and {{reflist|3}} will create a three-column list. Using {{reflist|colwidth=30em}} will allow the browser to automatically choose the number of columns based on the width of the web browser. Choose a column width that's appropriate for the average width of the references on the page. Note: multiple columns currently render properly only in [[Mozilla Firefox]].{{cite web|accessdate=2006-11-24|title=CSS3 Multi-Column Thriller|url=http://www.stuffandnonsense.co.uk/archives/css3_multi-column_thriller.html}}, though the feature is included in [[Cascading Style Sheets|CSS3]], so it should work for a larger number of browsers in the future.{{cite web|url=http://www.w3.org/TR/css3-multicol|title=CSS3 module: Multi-column layout|accessdate=2006-11-24}} == See also == * [[Wikipedia:Citing sources]] * [[Wikipedia:Footnotes]] == References == {{reflist}} [[Category:Citation templates| ]]

revision.comment: [[WP:AES|←]]ページの白紙化
[[Special:Contributions/高橋淳|高橋淳]] ([[User talk:高橋淳|会話]]) による ID:44527771 の版を[[H:RV|取り消し]]∵悪戯

revision.text:
{{AV女優 |モデル名=日向 小陽 |ふりがな=ひなた こはる |本名=上山慶子 |別名=小川あみ 栗田ひろみ |生年=1974 |生月=3 |生日=2 |出身地={{JPN}}・[[神奈川県]] |血液型=[[ABO式血液型|A型]] |時点=2012 |身長=145 |体重=51 |バスト=85 |ウエスト=57 |ヒップ=85 |カップ=E |股下= |靴= |身体備考= |デビュー= |ジャンル=[[グラビアページ|グラビア|アダルトビデオ]] |モデル内容=一般、水着、アダルトビデオ |その他の活動=[[プロレス]] |活動備考=AV女優としては、小川あみ、栗田ひろみとして活動。
|その他=生年月日はAV女優データベースを参考。}}
'''日向 小陽'''（ひなた こはる、[[1974年3月2日]] - ）は、[[日本]]の[[モデル (職業)|モデル]]、[[俳優|女優]]、[[AV女優]]であり、[[地下アイドル]]ユニット・HARU☆HINAの元メンバー、そして[[プロレス]]の[[レフェリー (プロレス)|レフェリー]]である。タレント活動はほぼ休止状態、レフェリーとしては[[Wrestling New Classic]]、AV女優としては[[プレステージ]]他所属。当初は本名の、上山 慶子（うえやま けいこ）で活動していた。（本人ブログより）[[神奈川県]]出身。
== 人物 == 中2より芸能活動をスタートさせ、モデル、舞台、テレビ、アダルトビデオなど幅広く活動<ref name="tajiri">{{Cite web|author=TAJIRI|title=女の子の新人レフェリー登場!!|url=http://www.japanesebuzzsaw.com/archives/5664|accessdate=2012-10-20}}</ref>。
[[いせひなた]]とHARU☆HINAを結成し、2010年2月5日に「恋愛シミュレーション」でデビュー<ref>{{Cite web|author=HAPPY MAP|title=HAPPY MAPタレント一覧|url=http://happymap2011.web.fc2.com/talent.html|accessdate=2012-10-20}}</ref>。8月22日にはソロデビューも果たす。
一方で、[[SMASH (格闘技団体)|SMASH]]の[[朱里]]の試合を観戦したのがきっかけとなり、プロレスラーを目指して2011年8月よりSMASHにて練習を始める<ref name="tajiri" />。まずはレフェリーの視点からプロレスを覚えるために12月30日のSMASH.24[[後楽園ホール]]大会でレフェリーデビュー。
2012年4月5日、[[TAJIRI]]以下元SMASH所属全選手、レフェリー、練習生とともに、新団体「Wrestling New Classic」に移籍<ref>[http://www.nikkansports.com/battle/news/f-bt-tp0-20120406-929400.html TAJIRI新団体発表「若手を海外に」] - 日刊スポーツ・2012年4月6日</ref>。
現在はレスラーを目指しタレントとWNCでのレフェリーを並行して活動。レフェリーとしては前座を裁いている。
== 出演作品 == === 舞台 === *テアトルアカデミー「私が捨てた女」 *東京シアタートリック **「戦国忍」 **「熱血ミッシェル」 **「罪」 *M&Aステージ「マリオネットは月夜に踊る」 *HAPPY MAP **「花」 **「君は誰かにその誰かも誰かに恋をする」 **「ただ春の夢の如し」 **「陰陽ガール」 **「孫悟空」
== ディスコグラフィー == === CD === ;HARU☆HINA *「恋愛シミュレーション」 *「笑顔の太陽」 ;ソロ *「虹色シャワー」 === DVD === *「あなただけのもの」 ===AV作品=== *「トランスフォーメーション [栗田ひろみ 山崎ちるい]」 *「Love Collection 310 3Pファック 無防備なオマンコにズッポリ [栗田ひろみ]」 *「毎度、メイドデリバリーです。 [山咲ちゆり 栗田ひろみ]」 *「4Pデリヘルクイーンズ 山咲ちゆり&栗田ひろみ」 *「QUIET 小川あみ」 *「コスプレドールズ VOL.23 小川あみ」 *「潮吹き・3P・乱交！！ めちゃめちゃイクイクお嬢様DX2」 *「トイズフリーク」
== 脚注 == {{Reflist}}
== 関連項目 == * [[神奈川県出身の人物一覧]]
== 外部リンク == * [http://ameblo.jp/koharu-145cm/ 公式ブログ] * [http://happymap2011.web.fc2.com/ HARU☆HINA公式プロフィール]
{{Idol-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:ひなた こはる}} [[Category:日本の女性モデル]] [[Category:日本のAV女優]] [[Category:舞台俳優]] [[Category:日本のアイドル]] [[Category:プロレスのレフェリー]] [[Category:SMASHの関係者]] [[Category:WNCの関係者]] [[Category:神奈川県出身の人物]] [[Category:存命人物]]

revision.text:
== Usage == Use this template to create a reference list in an article. For Example: 
== Content ==

Lorem ipsum.

== References ==

{{reflist}}
== See also == * [[Wikipedia:Citing sources]] * [[Wikipedia:Footnotes]]

revision.comment: more details of example
revision.text:
== Usage == Use this template to create a reference list in an article. For Example: 
== Content ==

Lorem ipsum.{{cite web|title=site1|url=http://en.wikipedia.org|accessdate=2006-10-19}}

Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet.{{cite web|title=site2|url=http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Wikipedia|accessdate=2006-10-22}}

== References ==

{{reflist}}
== See also == * [[Wikipedia:Citing sources]] * [[Wikipedia:Footnotes]]

== Usage == Use this template to create a reference list in an article (unlike [[Template:Reference]], '''Reflist''' doesn't include the ''References'' heading, thereby making the syntax easier to read). For Example: 
== Content ==

Lorem.{{cite web|title=site1|url=http://en.wikipedia.org|accessdate=2006-10-19}}

Lorem ipsum.{{cite web|title=site2|url=http://de.wikipedia.org|accessdate=2006-10-22}}

== References ==

{{reflist}}
== See also == * [[Wikipedia:Citing sources]] * [[Wikipedia:Footnotes]] [[Category:Citation templates| ]]

revision.text:
== Usage == Use this template to create a reference list in an article (unlike [[Template:Reference]], '''Reflist''' doesn't include the ''References'' heading, thereby making the syntax easier to read). For Example: 
== Content ==

Lorem.Source name, access date, etc.

Lorem ipsum.Source name, access date, etc.

== References ==

{{reflist}}
== Parameters == Using {{reflist|2}} will create a two-column reference list, and {{reflist|3}} will create a three-column list. Currently, multiple columns only render properly in Mozilla/Firefox. [http://www.stuffandnonsense.co.uk/archives/css3_multi-column_thriller.html] == See also == * [[Wikipedia:Citing sources]] * [[Wikipedia:Footnotes]] [[Category:Citation templates| ]]

revision.comment: changes to documentation of parameters
revision.text:
== Usage == Use this template to create a reference list in an article (unlike [[Template:Reference]], '''Reflist''' doesn't include the ''References'' heading, thereby making the syntax easier to read). For Example: 
== Content ==

Lorem ipsum.Source name, access date, etc.

Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet.Source name, access date, etc.

== References ==

{{reflist}}
== Parameters == Using {{reflist|2}} will create a two-column reference list, and {{reflist|3}} will create a three-column list. Using simply {{reflist|2}} will create a reference list which uses CSS3 to automatically choose the number of columns based on the width of the web browser and the size of the text. Currently, multiple columns only render properly in Mozilla/Firefox. [http://www.stuffandnonsense.co.uk/archives/css3_multi-column_thriller.html] == See also == * [[Wikipedia:Citing sources]] * [[Wikipedia:Footnotes]] [[Category:Citation templates| ]]

revision.comment: /* Parameters */ minor
revision.text:
== Usage == Use this template to create a reference list in an article (unlike [[Template:Reference]], '''Reflist''' doesn't include the ''References'' heading, thereby making the syntax easier to read). For Example: 
== Content ==

Lorem ipsum.Source name, access date, etc.

Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet.Source name, access date, etc.

== References ==

{{reflist}}
== Parameters == Using {{reflist|2}} will create a two-column reference list, and {{reflist|3}} will create a three-column list. Using simply {{reflist}} will create a reference list which incorporates CSS3 to automatically choose the number of columns based on the width of the web browser and the size of the text. Currently, multiple columns only render properly in Mozilla/Firefox. [http://www.stuffandnonsense.co.uk/archives/css3_multi-column_thriller.html] == See also == * [[Wikipedia:Citing sources]] * [[Wikipedia:Footnotes]] [[Category:Citation templates| ]]

revision.comment: change the default back to only a single column, see talk
revision.text:
== Usage == Use this template to create a reference list in an article (unlike [[Template:Reference]], '''Reflist''' doesn't include the ''References'' heading, thereby making the syntax easier to read). For Example: 
== Content ==

Lorem ipsum.Source name, access date, etc.

Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet.Source name, access date, etc.

== References ==

{{reflist}}
== Multiple columns == Using {{reflist|2}} will create a two-column reference list, and {{reflist|3}} will create a three-column list. Using {{reflist|colwidth=30em}} will allow the browser to automatically choose the number of columns based on the width of the web browser. Choose a column width that's appropriate for the average width of the references on the page. (note: multiple columns currently render properly only in Mozilla/Firefox. [http://www.stuffandnonsense.co.uk/archives/css3_multi-column_thriller.html]) == See also == * [[Wikipedia:Citing sources]] * [[Wikipedia:Footnotes]] [[Category:Citation templates| ]]

revision.comment: /* Multiple columns */ note that CSS3 means multiple columns will be more widely available
revision.text:
== Usage == Use this template to create a reference list in an article (unlike [[Template:Reference]], '''Reflist''' doesn't include the ''References'' heading, thereby making the syntax easier to read). For Example: 
== Content ==

Lorem ipsum.Source name, access date, etc.

Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet.Source name, access date, etc.

== References ==

{{reflist}}
== Multiple columns == Using {{reflist|2}} will create a two-column reference list, and {{reflist|3}} will create a three-column list. Using {{reflist|colwidth=30em}} will allow the browser to automatically choose the number of columns based on the width of the web browser. Choose a column width that's appropriate for the average width of the references on the page. Note: multiple columns currently render properly only in Mozilla/Firefox. [http://www.stuffandnonsense.co.uk/archives/css3_multi-column_thriller.html], though the feature is included in [[Cascading Style Sheets|CSS3]], so it should work for a larger number of browsers in the future. [http://www.w3.org/TR/css3-multicol/] == See also == * [[Wikipedia:Citing sources]] * [[Wikipedia:Footnotes]] [[Category:Citation templates| ]]

revision.text:
== Usage == Use this template to create a reference list in an article (unlike [[Template:Reference]], '''Reflist''' doesn't include the ''References'' heading, thereby making the syntax easier to read). For Example: 
== Content ==

Lorem ipsum.Source name, access date, etc.

Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet.Source name, access date, etc.

== References ==

{{reflist}}
== Multiple columns == Using {{reflist|2}} will create a two-column reference list, and {{reflist|3}} will create a three-column list. Using {{reflist|colwidth=30em}} will allow the browser to automatically choose the number of columns based on the width of the web browser. Choose a column width that's appropriate for the average width of the references on the page. Note: multiple columns currently render properly only in [[Mozilla Firefox]].{{cite web|accessdate=2006-11-24|title=CSS3 Multi-Column Thriller|url=http://www.stuffandnonsense.co.uk/archives/css3_multi-column_thriller.html}}, though the feature is included in [[Cascading Style Sheets|CSS3]], so it should work for a larger number of browsers in the future.{{cite web|url=http://www.w3.org/TR/css3-multicol|title=CSS3 module: Multi-column layout|accessdate=2006-11-24}} == See also == * [[Wikipedia:Citing sources]] * [[Wikipedia:Footnotes]] == References == {{reflist}} [[Category:Citation templates| ]]
